response.global_summary: The video features a talk segment by VTuber Shiranui Flare regarding a BEMANI game collaboration, followed by her musical performance of the song "僕の飛行機" (Boku no Hikouki). Full lyrics are provided on-screen throughout the performance.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare talks about a collaboration with BEMANI and announces the song "僕の飛行機". There is no vocal music in this segment.
Shiranui Flare performs "僕の飛行機" (Boku no Hikouki). The lyrics appear on-screen during the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どこまで飛べるかを 
確かめに僕ら 
旅に出る
夢は尽きることを忘れて 
草原を駆け抜けて行ったけど 
幼い憧れと 
ほどけた指切り 
絆にする
逃げ出せないからただ空を見てた 
かっこ悪いから嘘をついた 
白いノート1枚破って 
今日の日付とさよなら 
託した紙飛行機 
風に乗って舞い上がって 
蒼く溶けた
旅立ちの歌を背に 
白い軌道追いかけて 
ここで見てた浅い夢も 
翼にして
いつか誰かに届いてくれる？ 
僕の飛行機
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
How far can I fly? 
We set out on a journey to find out.
Forgetting that dreams end.
We ran across the prairie.
With our childhood longings, and our unraveled pinky promise.
Making it into a bond.
I couldn't escape, so I just looked at the sky.
I lied because it was uncool.
I tore one page from a white notebook, and said goodbye to today's date.
The paper airplane I entrusted it to.
Riding the wind, soaring up, melting into the blue.
With the song of departure on my back, chasing the white trail.
The shallow dreams I watched from here, too, become my wings.
Will they reach someone someday?
My airplane.
